item.title: Here's codex validating a [macOS only] launchd issue I previously had that you can't reliably reprod...
item.description:

Crabboxes ftw! https://t.co/ALbZGLQgch

item.title:
🦀📦Crabbox 0.4.0.
Often I need to quickly recreate conditions on macOS, Linux and Windows and need f...
item.description:
🦀📦Crabbox 0.4.0.
Often I need to quickly recreate conditions on macOS, Linux and Windows and need fast empheral machines.
Crabbox are machines for agents on the fly, using AWS spot instances, Hetzner or @useblacksmith.
Infinite codex + tests! https://t.co/RrFRMNRPVD
--- @steipete | ❤️ 63 | 🔁 4 | 💬 3 | 👁 4880
item.author: @steipete
